title: Notice of Product Exclusion Extensions: China Section 301 Investigation
summary: Extension of 178 product exclusions from Section 301 additional duties on Chinese goods through November 10, 2026, following US-China trade agreement announced November 1, 2025.

title: Notice of Modification of Section 301 Action: China Targeting of Maritime, Logistics, and Shipbuilding Sectors
summary: New Section 301 fees on Chinese vessel operators and Chinese-built ships calling at US ports. Fees scale by vessel type and cargo capacity.

title: Addressing Certain Tariffs on Imported Articles — Executive Order Implementation
summary: Implementation of reciprocal tariffs under IEEPA on imports from multiple countries. Vietnam 46-50%, Bangladesh 37-42%, Taiwan 32-37%, India 26-31%, South Korea 25-26%.

title: Section 232 Steel and Aluminum Tariff Inclusions Process
summary: Expansion of Section 232 steel and aluminum tariffs to cover derivative products. 25% additional duty on steel articles and 10% on aluminum articles from most countries.

title: Adjusting Imports of Copper into the United States
summary: New Section 232 investigation and tariff action on copper imports. 25% additional duty proposed on copper and copper alloy products.

title: Notice of Modification: Four-Year Review — Section 301 Tariff Increases on Chinese Products
summary: Results of four-year review of Section 301 tariffs. EVs increased to 100%, lithium-ion batteries to 25%, solar cells to 50%, semiconductors to 50% effective January 1 2025, medical gloves to 50%.

title: Modifying Reciprocal Tariff Rates — Further Adjustment
summary: Further modification of reciprocal tariff rates under IEEPA. Adjustments to rates for select countries following bilateral trade negotiations.

title: Addressing Threats to the United States by the Government of Brazil
summary: New tariff action on imports from Brazil under IEEPA emergency authority addressing trade practices and market access issues.
